content.text: Claude excels at these specific workloads:
— Tricky bugs, architectural decisions, multi-file refactors where careful reasoning matters more than speed
— Marketing copy, editorial content, articles requiring specific tone; output reads more human-like
— 91.3% on GPQA Diamond; legal analysis, financial review, research synthesis
— Less likely to drift or ignore constraints; holds nuanced ideas in tension
— 200K context with <5% degradation; process entire codebases in single pass
— Research synthesis, document preparation, data extraction from unstructured files
